author: Vincent Voyer
subject: chore(deps): upgrade all deps (algolia/react-instantsearch#163)
body:
+ remove babili, was minifying the actual output inside the npm package,
thus making source file errors complex to read for consumers
+ upgrade to webpack 3
+ fix an old require to storybook addons
https://github.com/storybooks/storybook/issues/1480

Linked to algolia/react-instantsearch#162
fixes algolia/react-instantsearch#154
